title: LCX8 P2-T07 desktop preload/IPC/file bridge/deep link/session source trace
scope: Trace desktop shell startup, active preload selection, session IPC/auth coordinator, offline renderer controls, file bridge and temp preview controllers, deep link parser/open/audit flow, notification route intents, and update controller boundaries into existing desktop ledger rows. This P2 trace separates source/contract proof from active shell wiring, OS integration, packaged release, external runtime, and owner approval proof.

anchors.description: startDesktopShell approved renderer, session IPC registration, window creation, navigation guards, loadURL
startElectronApp constructs runtime client and MainProcessAuthCoordinator
matterSession API exposed in active preload
registerSessionIpcHandlers maps channels to coordinator methods and returns disposer
renderer binds to window.matterSession and visible controls
materRuntime context source exists but is not active shell preload
sanitized materFileBridge API exposed only when this preload is loaded
registerFileBridgeIpcHandlers exists but main.js does not call it
temp preview manager setup and cleanup helpers
openMatterDeepLink permission precheck and audit flow
legacy simpler deep-link helper used by older permission test, not the LCX8 ledger route-intent source
notification click converts routeUrl to deep-link route intent
internal update apply/rollback and public channel denial controller

excluded_rows: No non-desktop rows are in P2-T07 scope.
apps/desktop/src/main/deep-link.js is noted as a legacy/simple helper; LCX8 route-intent rows use apps/desktop/src/main/deepLinks.js.

runtime.js, fileBridge.js preload, fileBridge.js controller, tempPreview.js manager, and updates.js controller are source/test surfaces but not active shell-wired by apps/desktop/src/main/main.js in this trace.

row_updates.label: Desktop shell launch
row_updates.handler: startDesktopShell -> assertApprovedRendererUrl(rendererUrl) -> registerSessionIpcHandlers(ipcMain, coordinator) -> createMainWindow(windowOptionsWithPreload(session.cjs)) -> installNavigationGuards(window) -> window.loadURL(target)
row_updates.outcome: native guard/source or contract behavior remains guarded; no launch/PASS claim

row_updates.label: Approved local dev renderer target
row_updates.handler: rendererTargetFromEnv -> assertApprovedRendererUrl; approved origins are file:// and http://127.0.0.1:5173
row_updates.outcome: native guard/source or contract behavior remains guarded; no launch/PASS claim

row_updates.label: Unapproved renderer/navigation/window-open
row_updates.handler: installNavigationGuards -> webContents.will-navigate preventDefault for unapproved target; setWindowOpenHandler denies unapproved url
row_updates.outcome: native guard/source or contract behavior remains guarded; no launch/PASS claim

row_updates.label: materRuntime.context
row_updates.handler: runtime.js contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld("materRuntime", runtimeApi), but active desktopPreloadPath() returns ../preload/session.cjs, not runtime.js
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.label: Desktop login email
row_updates.handler: input[data-login-email] local value; loginEmail() reads trimmed value during login()
row_updates.outcome: local renderer input state only; bridge boundary is on related submit row

row_updates.label: Desktop login password
row_updates.handler: input[data-login-password] local value; login() reads password and passes it through matterSession.login payload
row_updates.outcome: local renderer input state only; bridge boundary is on related submit row

row_updates.label: Desktop login submit
row_updates.handler: offline.html login button -> login() -> window.matterSession.login({ email, password }) -> session.cjs allowlist -> ipcRenderer.invoke("session:login") -> registerSessionIpcHandlers -> MainProcessAuthCoordinator.login -> runtimeClient.login; on ok, handoffToProductUi -> window.location.assign(./web/index.html?desktop=1&view=home&data=live&ctx=allow&splash=1)
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.label: Desktop logout
row_updates.handler: logout button -> logout() -> window.matterSession.logout() -> session:logout -> MainProcessAuthCoordinator.logout -> wipeSessionCaches({ secureStore, cacheStores }) -> signed_out session
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.handler: parseMatterDeepLink -> validate matter/document/task route-only URL -> openMatterDeepLink -> permissionClient.precheckDeepLinkOpen -> audit opened/denied event

row_updates.label: Auth callback deep link
row_updates.handler: parseMatterDeepLink(matter://auth/callback?code&state&issuer) validates required query and returns auth_callback routeOnly intent; openMatterDeepLink records auth_callback opened audit without permission precheck; auth completion state validation remains MainProcessAuthCoordinator.completeCallback
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.label: Forbidden action deep links
row_updates.handler: assertNoActionExecution rejects forbidden action hosts and query keys before route parsing/opening
row_updates.outcome: native guard/source or contract behavior remains guarded; no launch/PASS claim

row_updates.label: Invalid deep link route/query/id
row_updates.handler: parseMatterDeepLink rejects unsupported scheme/route, unknown query, invalid identifier, invalid auth callback path, and missing auth callback query

row_updates.label: Notification click route intent
row_updates.handler: notificationClickToRouteIntent(payload) requires routeUrl -> parseMatterDeepLink(routeUrl) -> returns { source: "notification", routeOnly: true, intent }
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.label: Notification action/sensitive payload guard
row_updates.handler: notificationClickToRouteIntent delegates to parseMatterDeepLink, so forbidden action/sensitive payload attempts are rejected by deep-link action and query guards
row_updates.outcome: native guard/source or contract behavior remains guarded; no launch/PASS claim

row_updates.label: Signed internal update apply
row_updates.handler: createUpdateController().applyUpdate -> deny public channel -> verify HMAC signature -> set previousVersion/activeVersion; desktopSkeletonStatus.updateChannelExposed is false and no active app update IPC/channel is exposed in main.js
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.label: Signed internal rollback
row_updates.handler: createUpdateController().rollback -> require previousVersion, matching verified target version, and valid signature before rolled_back state
row_updates.outcome: source/native bridge exists but active-shell, OS, packaged, runtime, or external receipt proof remains pending

row_updates.label: Public update channel
row_updates.handler: applyUpdate({ metadata }) returns { state: "denied", reason: "public_channel_disabled" } when metadata.channel === "public" before signature application
row_updates.outcome: native guard/source or contract behavior remains guarded; no launch/PASS claim

commands.command: JSON/CSV consistency check for ledger, inventory, CSV, and P2-T07 artifact
commands.summary: 324 ledger rows, 324 CSV rows, 28 P2-T07 scoped rows, status counts unchanged, UNKNOWN 0.
17 tests, 17 pass, 0 fail; validate-desktop-file-bridge-contract PASS; validate-matter-desktop-file-bridge PASS.
Route-intent-only contract passed; forbidden actions checked; owner approval remains false.
Logout and tenant-switch cleanup cover all required cache classes; renderer token storage remains disallowed.
No auto-detectable AI slop signals found.
